stemHtml: An aircraft has completed an approach procedure and is executing a visual manoeuvre (circling). While circling, visual contact with the runway environment is lost. Which of the following is the correct transition to the missed approach procedure?

options.b: Execute a 180 degree turn, back to the approach sector.
options.c: A climbing turn towards the landing runway.
options.d: Remain at MDA until visual reference is regained.
